tech.headline: Chinese Scientists Boost Kesterite Solar Cell Efficiency Using Potassium Fluoride
tech.summary: Chinese scientists improved kesterite solar cell efficiency to 8.04% by using potassium fluoride (KF) treatment. This process optimized absorber quality and interface properties, with efficiency gains driven by improved carrier management and reduced interface defects. The research focused on enhancing the cell's performance through these specific chemical treatments to optimize the overall interface properties of the device.

tech.headline: Baks Launches Non-Penetrative Ballast-Based Flat-Roof Mounting Solution
tech.summary: Baks, a Polish manufacturer, has launched a new ballast-based flat-roof mounting solution designed for fast, non-penetrative deployment. The product utilizes corrosion-resistant materials and simplified assembly to support scalable rooftop solar installations. This solution is specifically intended for use in commercial and industrial projects to ensure efficient deployment of solar arrays on flat roof surfaces.

learn.title: Climate Finance & COP Agreements
learn.intro: Understanding climate finance helps developing nations access clean energy investments.
learn.c1_text: Climate finance supports developing countries to adopt solar and wind technologies.
learn.c2_text: COP agreements shape funding rules for equitable energy transitions worldwide.
learn.c3_text: India aims for 500 GW renewables by 2030, guided by international financing.
learn.stat3: World: 45% of funding comes from multilateral institutions
learn.stat4: World: Developing nations receive 30% of global climate aid

learn.title: Small Wind Turbines
learn.intro: Small wind turbines provide clean power for homes and villages.
learn.c1_text: Wind spins blades connecting to a generator for electricity.
learn.c2_text: Local wind projects reduce energy bills and create jobs.
learn.c3_text: Small turbines power schools and clinics in rural Africa.

learn.title: Tidal Stream Energy
learn.intro: Predictable tides offer consistent renewable power potential.
learn.c1_text: Turbines capture energy from moving water in predictable currents.
learn.c2_text: Global tides could supply 10% of world electricity.
learn.c3_text: India targets 6 GW tidal by 2030 with coastal projects.

learn.title: Battery Management Systems
learn.intro: BMS protects batteries for longer life and safety.
learn.c1_text: Smart systems extend battery lifespan by up to 30%.
learn.c2_text: BMS reduces waste in electric vehicles and storage.
learn.c3_text: India rolls out BMS for EV batteries in 2023.

learn.title: Electric Buses & Trucks
learn.intro: Switching to electric transport cuts emissions significantly.
learn.c1_text: Electric buses run on charged batteries powering motors.
learn.c2_text: Lower operating costs and zero tailpipe pollution.

learn.title: Wave Energy Converters
